element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns to switch between characters and manage party composition throughout game

element_introduction_order.element: Unique character items (camera, lighter, medical kit, lockpick, vacuum cleaner)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each item becomes necessary for puzzle solving; player must backtrack with correct character
Metroidvania-style gradual exploration; player discovers interconnected layout through navigation
Menu-based combat, first-person perspective; variety includes zombies, ghosts, dolls
Limited tonics scattered in rooms; only method to restore health creates resource scarcity tension
Mechanic creates persistent consequences; alternative items found near corpses substitute for dead character functions
Requires backtracking to previous locations with newly acquired items; critical for progression
Requires quick decision-making; failure results in immediate character death

element_introduction_order.element: Environmental story elements (notes, diary entries, messages)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Optional but provide puzzle clues and narrative context; rewarded by thorough exploration
Narrative climax; survival of party members affects ending variation

typical_relief_triggers: Solving a puzzle and progressing forward
Reaching safe room areas without enemies
Discovering story notes that provide context
typical_tension_triggers: Low health conditions with no tonics nearby
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Survival-horror pacing with exploration interspersed with combat encounters; resource scarcity (tonics) creates constant low-level tension; permanent death mechanic maintains high stakes; narrative tension builds toward final confrontation with Lady Mamiya

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Secret messages and diary entries hidden in rooms provide optional narrative and puzzle hints; accessible through thorough exploration
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Environmental storytelling through optional notes scattered across mansion; past visitor diary entries reveal puzzle solutions and lore

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to party mechanics and basic enemy encounters; learning inventory management and character switching; moderate combat difficulty
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Puzzle complexity increases requiring backtracking with specific characters; quick time events introduce; health resource scarcity becomes more pronounced; character death becomes real threat
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex multi-item puzzles requiring careful item sequencing; heightened enemy difficulty; mounting pressure from mansion collapse; final boss confrontation with survival consequences affecting ending
notable_spikes: First character death encounter - introduces permanent consequence mechanic
Quick time event encounters - sudden difficulty spike requiring reflexes
Final boss Lady Mamiya - narrative and mechanical climax

notable_level_patterns.description: Single cohesive mansion structure with intricate layout allowing gradual exploration and backtracking; rooms interconnect in non-linear fashion; Metroidvania-style gating where certain areas become accessible only after acquiring specific character items or solving puzzles

Each of five playable characters possesses unique item necessary for progression; player must switch characters to access certain areas or solve specific puzzles; encourages revisiting locations with different party members
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Various locked areas requiring camera (journalist), lighter (cameraman), medical kit (nurse), lockpick (young man), or vacuum cleaner (electrician)

notable_level_patterns.description: Limited health tonics scattered throughout mansion; no guaranteed health restoration sources; creates constant resource management pressure and forces risk assessment during exploration

Story revealed through optional environmental text (notes, diary entries, messages) discovered during exploration; narrative mysteries solved through careful room exploration and item examination; past events communicated through environmental artifacts
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Projection room revealing Lady Mamiya tragedy through image display
